title: Third Avenue Curtails Trinity Place Holdings Investment
text: Third Avenue Management (Trades, Portfolio) revealed last week it curbed its stake in Trinity Place Holdings Inc. ( TPHS , Financial) by 15.78%.

title: Weyerhaeuser Is Inflationary, Not Cyclical
text: Earnings per share in the first quarter were $1.31, up 44% year over year. Wood Products which is lumber, plywood, and engineered wood were 82% of Adjusted EBITDA. Wood Product volume was about the same, the growth was from higher prices.
